visual_differentiation_axes: field-command tablet HUD instead of top pills and bottom strip
right-side squad rail with contextual bottom-left radial
bronze verdigris olive tactical palette within skin_military_tech
map ink overlays and carved tablet panels
icon based on command token, barracks marker, spear, and wheat
forbidden_visual_reuse: generic castle or shield launcher icon
top HUD pill cluster plus bottom command strip
full decorative frame over active playfield
same sword or tower foreground used by prior strategy projects

ui_identity.layout_archetype: battlefield command map with top-left resource ledger, right-side squad rail, and bottom-left contextual command radial
ui_identity.hud_composition: food wood stone population idle villagers objective strip selected squad count wave warning and compact pause control
ui_identity.navigation_model: menu to campaign map to gameplay, with pause overlay and result panel; gameplay commands stay in contextual overlays
ui_identity.palette_signature: dark olive base, aged bronze accents, verdigris highlights, wheat-gold resource warnings, pale mint tactical text, stone-gray panels
ui_identity.material_language: carved command tablet panels, bronze rivets, map ink lines, low-glow tactical selection marks, restrained military-tech surfaces
ui_identity.typography_style: compact uppercase labels, high-readability numeric resource values, short objective text, no ornate fantasy lettering
ui_identity.primary_ui_pack: skin_military_tech token foundation with bronze field-command XML refinements
secondary_ui_assets: resource glyphs for food wood and stone

reserved_edges: top 12 percent for resource ledger and objective strip
bottom-left 22 percent by 26 percent for contextual command radial
playfield_safety.frame_overlay_policy: decorative frames and tablet edges may occupy only reserved HUD dead space and must never cover paths, units, resource nodes, building footprints, or selection gestures

unique_screen_motifs: campaign nodes shown as clay route tablets
resource ledger styled as carved inventory notches
radial commands shaped like bronze planning tokens
result screen shown as a stamped battle report
forbidden_ui_elements: large generic card stack over the playfield

icon_identity.subject: cartoon bronze commander hand placing a tiny barracks marker beside spear and wheat symbols on a camp map
icon_identity.silhouette: round command seal with diagonal spear, small hut block, and visible wheat shape
icon_identity.composition: large hand and command marker in foreground, simplified camp grid below, spear crossing behind the marker, wheat tucked as resource cue
icon_identity.palette: bronze, dark olive, stone gray, wheat gold, small verdigris highlight
icon_identity.background: stylized carved map disk with subtle grid and no generic shield badge
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: base-building decision represented by the barracks marker and resource wheat on a tactical map
forbidden_icon_reuse: unmodified icon from another generated game
